vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA)
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications Insecure Library Loading Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) contains an insecure library loading vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) contains an insecure library loading vulnerability that could allow...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
